steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the number of SNOTEL sites in Wyoming. The relevant note is "There are around 90 sites throughout Wyoming." The correct answer must lead with that quantity and frame it as notable.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In Wyoming alone, there are around 90 SNOTEL sites located throughout the state.: Leads with the quantity (90) and uses "In Wyoming alone" to stress the state-specific count. Directly fulfills the goal. ✓
  • Choice B — One particular SNOTEL site is located at Cottonwood Creek in Wyoming.: Highlights a single site, not the number of sites. ✗
  • Choice C — SNOTEL sites collect snow measurement data throughout the state of Wyoming.: Describes what the sites do, not how many there are. ✗
  • Choice D — Snow hydrologist Nora Falkenberg helps maintain SNOTEL sites, such as the one at Cottonwood Creek, Wyoming.: Focuses on the hydrologist and a single example site; omits the count entirely. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
